agents.name: Alert Correlator
agents.desc: Ingests and correlates ELK and Oracle OEM alerts. 4,000/day → 320 actionable.
agents.description: Correlates ELK Stack and Oracle Enterprise Manager alerts across Oracle EBS, Informatica, Salesforce, Primavera and OCI infrastructure.

anatomy.output: Single XURRENT incident with confidence score

agents.name: RCA Engine
agents.desc: Root cause analysis across Oracle EBS, Informatica, OCI and Salesforce dependency chains.
agents.description: Traverses Oracle EBS concurrent request logs, Informatica execution history, OCI metrics and Salesforce integration traces to identify root cause.

anatomy.process: Dependency graph traversal → Root cause hypothesis → Confidence scoring
anatomy.output: Root cause with confidence score and pre-approved remediation plan

agents.name: Log Analyzer
agents.desc: Analyses Oracle EBS concurrent request logs, Informatica execution logs and ELK log streams.
agents.description: Deep log analysis across Oracle Forms, Concurrent Processing, Informatica job logs and OCI infrastructure logs.

anatomy.process: Log ingestion → Pattern matching → Anomaly detection → Timeline reconstruction

agents.name: Remediation Agent
agents.desc: Executes pre-approved remediations: Informatica job restarts, Oracle EBS reprocessing, AR reversals.
agents.description: Runs pre-approved automation scripts for Informatica recovery, Oracle EBS ship confirm reprocessing, Primavera invoice correction and AR mandate fixes.

anatomy.process: Risk scoring → Pre-approved script match → Execution → Validation
anatomy.output: Remediation executed with full audit trail in XURRENT

agents.name: Change Validator
agents.desc: Validates all changes against Oracle EBS config, Informatica schedules and XURRENT CMDB.
agents.description: Validates Oracle EBS, Informatica and OCI changes — XURRENT CMDB sync, risk assessment, rollback readiness.

anatomy.process: Risk assessment → CMDB check → Approval routing → Execution gate
anatomy.output: Approved or escalated with risk score

agents.name: Oracle Ops Agent
agents.desc: Specialist agent for Oracle EBS concurrent processing, AR, OTC and OCI infrastructure operations.
agents.description: Deep Oracle EBS expertise — concurrent request management, ship confirm reprocessing, AR mandate handling, Informatica→EBS integration health.

anatomy.trigger: Alert Correlator or RCA Engine identifies Oracle EBS issue
anatomy.process: Concurrent log analysis → Transaction inspection → Reprocessing → Validation
anatomy.output: Oracle EBS transaction cleared with revenue impact assessment

agents.name: Capacity Planner
agents.desc: Predictive capacity planning for OCI instances, Oracle DB and Informatica job scheduling.
agents.description: Forecasts OCI resource needs, Oracle DB growth, Informatica job slot requirements and period-end load spikes.

anatomy.trigger: Capacity threshold approaching or period-end forecast
anatomy.process: Usage trend analysis → Breach prediction → Pre-emptive action
anatomy.output: Scaled resource or scheduled maintenance window
